sglang.title: Apply dsv3 router gemm kernel for deepseek-r1 fp4
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Apply kernel added in #7627 to dpsk-r1 fp4 model.
Currently we have to convert the dtype of router logits back to bf16, otherwise there will be cuda illegal memory bug. We should modify the router gemm kernel so that it outputs bf16 logits.
This PR can improve performance on bs = 1, but f

sglang.title: [CPU] Bind threads and numa node for each TP rank
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR binds threads and numa node for each TP rank when device is CPU, which will improvement the performance on CPU.
For example, when running --tp 6 on a machine with 6 sub-numa nodes, with this PR, rank 0 will be bound to core 0-39 on node 0, rank 1 to core 40-79 on node 1, etc.
pyt

sglang.title: Support non-contiguous query input for extend/decode attention
sglang.author: yanbing-j
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to support non-contiguous query input for extend/decode attention, which is required in Llama-3.1-8B. UTs are updated.
And this PR only has sgl-kernel change, and is not related to python frontend.

sglang.title: Support updating weights at once by stopping all requests
sglang.author: tianyuzhou95
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, when updating model weights, we have to wait for all requests to complete generation before we can start updating. This significantly reduces the throughput of batch inference especially in RL scenarios. Therefore, a method is needed to quickly stop all running/queued requests

Modifications

sglang.title: [CPU] [sgl-kernel] set dispatch key of initialize to CatchAll
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

For the initialize OP, there were no tensor arguments to this OP and torch::kCPU does not work in this case. We need to use CatchAll as mentioned here: #6770 (comment).
#7524 has done the same for this OP init_cpu_threads_env.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fixes for FlashInfer's TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
CUDA 11.8 build is broken on main because we build for the same set of CUDA arches unconditionally.
This PR updates the TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST to one supported by FLASHINFER.
Future work would be to respect the TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST passed in by the user, stripping out the unsupported arches.
T

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix DP headless mode arg validation
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Last-minute bug introduced in #19790.
Had intended to check engine_args.data_parallel_rank rather than parallel_config.data_parallel_rank, the latter will never be None.
Will make sure we have proper CI coverage of headless mode in a follow-on PR.
Fixes #20399

vllm.title: [Tests] Update online DP tests to verify that requests are balanced
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This was a gap in our current DP tests.
Updated to use metrics to verify that requests are balanced evenly between the data parallel ranks.
Via custom stats logger in the AsyncLLM interface case and external prometheus metrics in API server case.
